title: Unique Dark Hotbar Add-On
description: Hotbar Add-On for Unique Dark | Changes the style of the hotbar
body:
# Unique Dark - Hotbar Add-On

[![amongstreality on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/amongstreality/projects)
[![amongstreality on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/user/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

This resource pack is an add-on for [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark)

> ⚠️ **Warning:** this resource pack is only available for download on CurseForge and Modrinth. If you find it on any other platform - **do not download it** from them, because they redistribute it unofficially and unauthorized. The download links may lead to malicious websites and the content you download may contain viruses.

## Support me and my projects here:

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/patreon@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/bmc@3x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

### Mod support

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)


<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>

Copyright © Unique Dark - Hotbar Add-On

Author AmongstReality

Links to pages of the author on different platforms:

- [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
- [BuyMeACoffee](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/amongstreality/projects)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AmongstReality)
- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amongstreality/)

When you can use my assets:

- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that
  includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can **NOT** use my assets:

- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

</details>
